title: hopea celtidifolia
intro: Hopea celtidifolia, also known as the Borneo ironwood or selanganum, is a species of tree native to Borneo that is valued for its durable and versatile timber. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hopea celtidifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
